name: ffmpeg-cloud-gpl-features-removed
description: A small vcpkg wrapper arround ffmpeg, to build a patched version of ffmpeg with features disabled

cloudffmpegbinary.description: Build ffmpeg with features disabled and certain encoders enabled. Equivalent of building ffmpeg[ffprobe,ffmpeg,mp3lame,fdk-aac,x264,x265,gpl,avcodec]
